title: Policy: Remove some settings from Policy - Settings Unlocked
scenario: Locked settings become unlocked in the Poly Studio Mobile app after being removed from a Cloud Policy and the policy is reapplied
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on the Android device.
2. Navigate to the Home screen and ensure a Poly Bluetooth audio device is connected.
3. On the Cloud management portal, locate the existing Policy applied to this device.
4. Remove one or more previously locked settings from the Policy (e.g., ANC, Transparency Mode, Equalizer).
5. Save and apply the updated Policy to the device.
6. On the Android device, go to Poly Studio Mobile → [Device Name] → Audio Settings.
7. Check the previously locked settings (e.g., ANC, Transparency Mode, Equalizer).
8. Attempt to change each of those settings (e.g., toggle ANC on/off, adjust Equalizer presets).
expected: The previously locked settings are now unlocked in the app. The user can successfully change each setting (e.g., toggle ANC, adjust Transparency Mode, modify Equalizer).
